task_completion.description: Verify that the 8-week body weight history has been logged in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a weight chart or list of weight entries in the wger interface showing dates from January to February 2026 with values ranging from 66.5 to 68.2 kg.

task_completion.description: Verify that the two physiological measurement categories are created with the correct units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Cooper Test Distance' with unit 'm' and 'Resting Heart Rate' with unit 'bpm' in the measurement categories or metrics section.

task_completion.description: Verify that historical data for the measurement categories has been logged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for specific data entries for Cooper Test Distance (e.g., 3420, 3465) and Resting Heart Rate (e.g., 52, 51) on dates in Jan/Feb 2026.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 16-week periodized training routine is created with the correct name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a routine named '16-Week Marathon Spring Periodization' with the description 'Elite marathon runner spring race preparation: Base, Build, Peak, Taper phases'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the training days are added to the routine with correct day-of-week assignments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the routine details showing days like 'Base Phase - Long Run' (assigned to day 7 / Sunday), 'Base Phase - Easy Recovery' (day 3 / Wednesday), 'Build Phase - Tempo Work' (day 2 / Tuesday), 'Build Phase - Long Intervals' (day 5 / Friday), 'Peak Phase - Race Pace' (day 2 / Tuesday), and 'Taper Phase - Shakeout' (day 5 / Friday).

task_completion.description: Verify that the competition-phase nutrition plan is created with the correct daily macro targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a nutrition plan named 'Marathon Competition Phase - Race Week' with the macro targets visible: 3200 kcal Energy, 145g Protein, 480g Carbs, and 75g Fat.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the wger web interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the wger web application in a browser, filling out forms, and clicking buttons, rather than executing terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show the actual wger fitness manager interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the wger fitness manager at http://localhost, with its typical layout, navigation menus, and styling.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply edit a text file to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final results should be visible within the wger web application, not just in a text editor showing the specification file.
